title: hyprtrdr
description: An intelligent, parallelized test runner and CI pipeline optimizer that analyzes git history and dependency graphs to run only affected tests.
results: Reduced average CI test execution time by 68% (from 22 minutes to under 7 minutes).
Saved over $12,000/month in compute credits by caching dependency layers and parallelizing containerized test runners.
Achieved 99.8% accuracy in identifying changed modules and downstream dependencies via custom AST parsing.

title: 11ty Blog Template
description: A zero-runtime, compile-time CSS extraction tool for modern component frameworks that outputs optimized vanilla CSS.
results: Decreased frontend JS bundle size by 32% across production micro-frontends by eliminating runtime CSS injections.
Improved Core Web Vitals, reducing Interaction to Next Paint (INP) by 45ms and Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) by 250ms.
Integrated a custom static analysis parser that detects and purges 100% of unused utility declarations at build time.

title: Blog
description: A real-time whiteboard application leveraging Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs) and WebSockets for peer-to-peer data sync.
results: Achieved sub-30ms local state update latency and robust conflict resolution for up to 100 concurrent editors per workspace.
Designed a custom delta-compression protocol that minimized WebSocket packet payload size by 75%.
Implemented a secure local-first offline fallback using IndexedDB, enabling seamless reconnection and automated reconciliation.
